title: trichera × sambucifolia
intro: Trichera × sambucifolia is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, created by crossing Trichera glandulifera and Sambucus ebulus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Trichera × sambubifolia include alleviating fever, reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Trichera × sambucifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
